settings.heading: Cut loose. Wear heavy.
settings.subheading: Oversized, mineral-washed, dropped shoulders. The baggy shirt and trouser built for the streets — sold apart or as the set.

settings.quote: We make one thing, and we make it heavy.
settings.body: kaafpk started with a single idea — a baggy fit that actually holds up. No 12-product catalog, no fast-fashion churn. One shirt, one trouser, cut oversized and washed soft, made in Faisalabad and shipped across Pakistan.

settings.description: 240 GSM poly-cotton, mineral-washed, dropped shoulders. Wear it apart or grab the matching trouser as a set.
